header.name: Kehinde Jonathan Irhodia
header.bio: Biotechnology graduate, biodiagnostics researcher, and software engineer focused on affordable point-of-care diagnostics, microfluidic devices, and open-source systems tooling. I work across laboratory research and production software, with projects in Rust and Python totaling over 113,000 downloads.

experience.title: Software / Systems Engineer, Alphaday (Alphabox Solutions)
experience.description: Core engineer on a crypto research and news dashboard. Built Python/Django market-data harvesters, sentiment and OHLCV pipelines, and AWS-backed data infrastructure.

experience.title: Undergraduate Research Associate, Biosensor & Biodiagnostics Lab (FUTA)
experience.description: Developed aptamers for Plasmodium falciparum lactate dehydrogenase detection, optimized EMSA workflows, and co-designed a microfluidic device for multiplex bacterial detection with gold-nanoparticle colorimetric readout.

experience.title: Research Intern, National Biosafety Management Agency (NBMA)
experience.description: Conducted biosafety risk assessments and regulatory-compliance checks for genetically modified organisms under technical supervision.

experience.title: Founder & Engineer, AuraPay
experience.description: Built a payments platform focused on seamless customer transactions and reliability across the payment flow.

experience.title: Creator & Maintainer, ngyn-rs
experience.description: Author and lead maintainer of the ngyn Rust web framework ecosystem, alongside related tooling including momenta and other OSS packages.

skills.items: Aptamer technology (SELEX, binding kinetics) · PCR/RT-PCR · DNA/RNA extraction · ELISA · assay optimization and validation
Laser-printed uPADs · droplet microfluidics · photolithography · gold-nanoparticle synthesis and functionalization · colorimetric detection
Python (BioPython, NumPy, Pandas) · R (Bioconductor) · BLAST · MEGA · SnapGene · statistical modeling and data visualization
Rust · Python · TypeScript/JavaScript · React · Next.js · Svelte · Docker · Kubernetes · CI/CD · PostgreSQL/SQLite · distributed data pipelines

interests: Microfluidic paper devices for resource-limited settings

education.degree: B.Tech in Biotechnology (Second Class Honours, Upper Division) · CGPA 3.94/5.00
education.school: Federal University of Technology, Akure (FUTA), Nigeria
